description: CompositionPurple polo t-shirt with light brown and white stripes made of 100% compact Giza cotton, has a ribbed collar, a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cold water with like colours inside out using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeMedium heat steam iron do not iron on decorationsA fabulous creation from the arrow Premium Collection, this t-shirt is designed to offer exemplary comfort, keeping you comfortable all day, and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team this with jeans and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
